meanings.definition: events that provide the generative force that is the origin of something
examples: they are trying to determine the cause of the crash

meanings.definition: a justification for something existing or happening
examples: he had no cause to complain
they had good reason to rejoice

meanings.definition: a series of actions advancing a principle or tending toward a particular end
examples: they worked in the cause of world peace
the team was ready for a drive toward the pennant

meanings.definition: any entity that produces an effect or is responsible for events or results
a comprehensive term for any proceeding in a court of law whereby an individual seeks a legal remedy
examples: the family brought suit against the landlord

meanings.definition: give rise to; cause to happen or occur, not always intentionally
cause to do; cause to act in a specified manner
examples: The ads induced me to buy a VCR
My children finally got me to buy a computer
My wife made me buy a new sofa
